name: Pork Tenderloin with Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork tenderloin in a 24-oz shallow casserole.
2. Sprinkle with salt and onion.
3. Cover with vented plastic wrap and microwave on medium (50%) power for 4 minutes; rotate the casserole 1/4 turn.
4. Microwave another 4 minutes longer.
5. Mix the remaining ingredients: mustard, chopped onion, chopped green pepper, and flour.
6. Spoon the mixture over the pork.
7. Cover with vented plastic wrap and microwave until the pork is done (4 to 6 minutes total), turning the casserole 1/4 turn every 3 minutes.
